    About Concert Tickets

    Live music is more than just sound—it’s an experience. The energy of a packed arena, the anticipation before the first note, and the shared excitement between fans and artists make concerts unforgettable. 

    If you're looking to sing along with Taylor Swift at SoFi Stadium, catch an intimate show with Phoebe Bridgers at The Ryman Auditorium or experience the energy of Bad Bunny at a massive outdoor festival, SeatGeek connects you to the best live music events with ease.

    From rock legends like The Rolling Stones to chart-topping stars like Billie Eilish, our platform offers tickets for concerts across every genre and venue type. Whether you’re chasing front-row seats, looking for budget-friendly options or hoping to score last-minute tickets, SeatGeek’s Deal Score helps you find the best value. With our interactive seat maps and transparent pricing, you can buy with confidence—no hidden fees, no surprises.

    No matter your music taste—classic rock, rap, country, punk, Latin, indie or R&B—SeatGeek is your go-to source for live concerts. Whether you're heading to an arena show at Madison Square Garden, a music festival in the desert or a small club gig in Nashville, we make finding and buying concert tickets simple. Start exploring and get ready for an unforgettable show!

    Why buy concert tickets on SeatGeek?

    Find concert tickets for every music genre

    SeatGeek offers access to concerts for every type of music fan. If you’re looking for a stadium rock tour, an underground punk show or the latest Latin pop sensation, we’ve got you covered. 

    Our extensive selection includes:

    • Classic rock concert tickets: Catch legendary bands like The Rolling Stones, Eagles and Bruce Springsteen at venues like Allegiant Stadium or Madison Square Garden.

    • Rap & hip-hop concert tickets: See top artists like Drake, Travis Scott and Kendrick Lamar perform at the Kia Forum or Barclays Center.

    • Country concert tickets: From Morgan Wallen and Luke Combs to classic icons like George Strait and Reba McEntire, country fans can experience concerts at venues like the Grand Ole Opry or Red Rocks Amphitheatre.

    • Punk & indie concert tickets: Discover acts like Blink-182 and The 1975 or rising indie stars at legendary venues like The Fillmore or First Avenue.

    • Latin concert tickets: Experience high-energy performances from Bad Bunny, Karol G and Maluma at venues like Kaseya Center in Miami.

    • R&B & soul concert tickets: Catch smooth vocals from SZA, Usher and Alicia Keys at intimate theaters or major arenas like The O2 in London.

    Interactive seat maps & deal score

    Choosing the right seat can make or break your concert experience. That’s why SeatGeek offers interactive seating charts that give you a clear view of the venue layout. Our Deal Score feature ranks ticket listings based on value, helping you find the best price for the experience you want.

    No hidden fees, no surprises

    Nothing’s worse than finding a great deal only to be hit with unexpected fees at checkout. At SeatGeek, we believe in transparent pricing. Regardless of if you're buying tickets for Ed Sheeran at Soldier Field or a last-minute show at the Troubadour, what you see is what you pay—no last-minute fees, just great deals on concert tickets.

    Buy with confidence

    We partner with trusted ticket providers to ensure every purchase is safe and secure. With verified resale tickets and authentic primary ticketing options, you’ll always get legitimate seats—if it’s for Foo Fighters at Fenway Park or Beyoncé at AT&T Stadium.

    Get your concert tickets on SeatGeek today

    No matter what type of music you love, SeatGeek makes it easy, secure and affordable to find the best concert tickets. Whether you’re heading to a sold-out stadium show for Beyoncé, a local indie gig at the Troubadour or a major festival like Coachella, you’ll find the perfect seats right here. 

    Start browsing today and get ready for an unforgettable live music experience!

    How much do concert tickets cost?

    Concert ticket prices vary widely based on factors like the artist, venue, demand and seat location. Smaller club shows can start at $20-$50, while major arena and stadium concerts for top artists can range from $100 to several hundred dollars. Festivals and VIP experiences may cost even more, especially if they include premium seating or exclusive perks.

    How can I get cheap Concerts tickets?

    To find affordable Concerts tickets:

    • Buy early: Prices often go up as the event date gets closer.

    • Check for last-minute deals: Sometimes, resellers drop prices as the show approaches.

    • Use Deal Score: SeatGeek ranks listings based on value, so you can find the best price.

    • Compare sections: Sometimes, moving just a few rows back can save you a significant amount.

    Where can I buy Concerts tickets?

    You can buy Concerts tickets directly through SeatGeek or the SeatGeek app.

    How can I find tickets for specific concert genres like rock, rap or country?

    SeatGeek offers concert tickets across all music genres. You can browse subcategories like Classic Rock, Rap, Country, Punk, Latin, Indie and R&B to find upcoming shows in your favorite genre.

    What are the best seats for a concert?

    The best concert seats depend on your preference:

    • Floor seats: Offer an up-close experience but may require standing for long periods.

    • Lower-level sections: Provide great views without the crowds of the floor.

    • Balcony & upper-level: Often more affordable and still provide a good view, especially in arenas.

    • VIP & premium seating: Sometimes include perks like early entry, exclusive lounges or meet-and-greet opportunities.

    Can I get last-minute concert tickets?

    SeatGeek makes it easy to find last-minute concert tickets, often at discounted rates. Many venues offer mobile ticketing, allowing you to purchase and access your ticket right from your phone.

    Are concert tickets refundable?

    Refund policies vary by concert event and ticket seller. Some tickets may be non-refundable, while others allow exchanges or resale. Be sure to review SeatGeek’s policies or check with the ticket provider before purchasing.

    How do I receive my concert tickets?

    Most concert tickets are delivered electronically and can be accessed through the SeatGeek app. Some events may still offer physical tickets or will-call pickup, but digital tickets are now the most common method.
